sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91248" key="ptueli/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτυελ-ίζω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτυελ-ισμός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτύελ-ον</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτυελ-ώδης</orth>, <sense id="n91248.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πτυαλίζω</ref></xr>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
